name: codex-traffic-light
description: A floating traffic light that shows Codex working, approval, and completion states.

interface.shortDescription: See working, approval, and completion states
interface.longDescription: Shows a small always-on-top traffic light for Codex Desktop. Yellow means Codex is working, flashing yellow means approval is required, green means the run is complete, and red means no readable session is available.
defaultPrompt: 设置 Codex 红绿灯开机自启
